inputEvidence.determination: METADATA COVERAGE PARTIAL — EXTRACTION PROTOTYPE ALLOWED WITH REVIEW BUCKETS
EXTRACTION PROTOTYPE PARTIAL — VALIDATION ALLOWED WITH REVIEW BUCKETS
EXTRACTION VALIDATION PARTIAL — CONFIDENCE VALIDATION ALLOWED WITH REVIEW BUCKETS

DIRECTIONAL EVIDENCE CHAIN COMPLETE WITH REVIEW BUCKETS — GOVERNANCE REVIEW ALLOWED

confidenceGovernance.trustedDirectionalEvidence: multiple non-bearing metadata signals with validated extraction continuity, no review bucket, no source instability, and no protected-system dependency
confidenceGovernance.reviewRequiredDirectionalEvidence: any segment carrying reversible lane, construction, HOV/HOT, missing county, missing oneway, missing ref, manual review, or other uncertainty requiring human/governance review
confidenceGovernance.unacceptableDirectionalEvidence: bearing-only evidence, corrupted source evidence, missing required metadata after prior coverage, silently promoted review records, or evidence that depends on runtime/display activation
confidenceGovernance.result: strong candidates are governance-eligible only; review-required candidates remain isolated for review

reviewBucketGovernance.result: review buckets remain protected governance review items

bearingGovernance.result: bearing-only directional evidence prohibited and absent

countyGovernance.result: county evidence does not change county status or activation posture

downgradeGovernance.requiredAction: downgrade affected records to governance_review_required or governance_blocked until evidence is revalidated

expansionGovernance.result: future corridors must not bypass the authoritative chain

runtimeProtectionReview.result: no runtime, UI, display, DriveTexas, or Transportation Intelligence authorization

governanceReadinessState: GOVERNANCE REVIEW COMPLETE WITH REVIEW BUCKETS — GOVERNANCE PACKAGE ALLOWED
finalDetermination: GOVERNANCE REVIEW COMPLETE WITH REVIEW BUCKETS — GOVERNANCE PACKAGE ALLOWED
